summary: Completed frontend testing of P0 batting order continuity bug fix and Total Pitches (P) column feature. All 4 features tested and verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code fix verified: handleInPlayResult now advances batter index BEFORE the 3-out check (lines 2101-2107), ensuring batting order continues correctly when team bats again
Code fix verified: handlePitchResult also advances batter index on 3rd out strikeout (lines 1904-1911)
P column correctly implemented in TeamStatsSummary component (lines 1267-1315) using pitches_thrown stat
context_for_next_testing_agent: All batting order continuity and pitch tracking features are working correctly. The P0 bug fix has been verified - batting order now continues from where it left off after 3 outs.

batting_order_continuity_strikeouts.test_scenario: Top 1st: 3 strikeouts (batters #2, #4, #8). Bottom 1st: 3 strikeouts (batters #1, #5, #7). Top 2nd: Batter #11 is up (4th in order)
batting_order_continuity_strikeouts.expected: Batter #11 Josh Lee (4th in Valley Hawks order)
batting_order_continuity_strikeouts.actual: Batter #11 Josh Lee correctly shown as current batter
batting_order_continuity_strikeouts.notes: Strikeout properly advances batter index even when it's the 3rd out

batting_order_continuity_inplay_outs.test_scenario: Top 1st: 3 in-play outs (ground out, fly out, ground out). Bottom 1st: 3 in-play outs. Top 2nd: Verify batter 4 is up
batting_order_continuity_inplay_outs.expected: Batter #11 Josh Lee (4th in Valley Hawks order)
batting_order_continuity_inplay_outs.actual: Batter #11 Josh Lee correctly shown as current batter
batting_order_continuity_inplay_outs.notes: In-play results (ground out, fly out) properly advance batter index even when it's the 3rd out

total_pitches_column_display.test_scenario: Check Team Stats table for P column header
total_pitches_column_display.expected: P column visible in Team Stats
total_pitches_column_display.actual: P column present with headers: R, H, E, SO, BB, P
total_pitches_column_display.notes: Column displays in blue text for pitch counts

total_pitches_column_updates.expected: P column shows 5 for pitching team
total_pitches_column_updates.actual: Riverside Sluggers P column shows 5 after 5 pitches
total_pitches_column_updates.notes: Pitch count updates correctly in real-time for each pitch recorded

playwright_test_results.inplay_out_batting_order_test: PASS - Ground out/fly out properly advance batter on 3rd out
playwright_test_results.p_column_exists: PASS - Team Stats shows R, H, E, SO, BB, P columns

code_verification.handlePitchResult_fix: Lines 1904-1911: Batter index advances for CURRENT team even on 3rd out strikeout
code_verification.handleInPlayResult_fix: Lines 2101-2107: Batter index advances unconditionally BEFORE 3-out check for all in-play results
code_verification.TeamStatsSummary_P_column: Lines 1267-1315: calcTotals includes pitches_thrown, displayed in P column
